records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Sitting in that awkward position has me feeling queasy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Sitting in that awkward position has me feeling queasy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Sitting in that awkward position has me feeling queasy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That big building there, is that the lab they were talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That big building there, is that the lab they were talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That big building there, is that the lab they were talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It collapsed once, but there was a lot worth salvaging, so I rebuilt it with my ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It collapsed once, but there was a lot worth salvaging, so I rebuilt it with my ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It collapsed once, but there was a lot worth salvaging, so I rebuilt it with my ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are lots of hazardous systems, so no one comes here unless they need to, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are lots of hazardous systems, so no one comes here unless they need to, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are lots of hazardous systems, so no one comes here unless they need to, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is exactly one person who visits this facility regularly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is exactly one person who visits this facility regularly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is exactly one person who visits this facility regularly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This business is probably her doing too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This business is probably her doing too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This business is probably her doing too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every town has at least one troublemaker.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every town has at least one troublemaker.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every town has at least one troublemaker.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You and the militia must have your hands full keeping her in line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You and the militia must have your hands full keeping her in line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You and the militia must have your hands full keeping her in line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strictly speaking, she isn't a villager. We are just letting her stay for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strictly speaking, she isn't a villager. We are just letting her stay for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strictly speaking, she isn't a villager. We are just letting her stay for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is her name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is her name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is her name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lenore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lenore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lenore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Figures. My bad hunches never seem to be wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Figures. My bad hunches never seem to be wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Figures. My bad hunches never seem to be wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Human tracks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Human tracks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Human tracks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just one. Looks like they have company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just one. Looks like they have company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just one. Looks like they have company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Three... And I can see traces of something non-human as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Three... And I can see traces of something non-human as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Three... And I can see traces of something non-human as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If several of them crossed into the off-limits zone, that cannot be for anything good. What do you want to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If several of them crossed into the off-limits zone, that cannot be for anything good. What do you want to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If several of them crossed into the off-limits zone, that cannot be for anything good. What do you want to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we just wait for the other militia members, we might be too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we just wait for the other militia members, we might be too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we just wait for the other militia members, we might be too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they are moving quietly, that means they don't want to be noticed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they are moving quietly, that means they don't want to be noticed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they are moving quietly, that means they don't want to be noticed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're better off not giving them time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're better off not giving them time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're better off not giving them time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agreed. You are young and sharp. The more I see, the more I want to recruit you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agreed. You are young and sharp. The more I see, the more I want to recruit you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agreed. You are young and sharp. The more I see, the more I want to recruit you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, if my future apprentice is fighting, I cannot just stand by and watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, if my future apprentice is fighting, I cannot just stand by and watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, if my future apprentice is fighting, I cannot just stand by and watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I owe Lenore too, so I will lend you my strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I owe Lenore too, so I will lend you my strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I owe Lenore too, so I will lend you my strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forty-seven... Forty-eight Corrupted Eterniums...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forty-seven... Forty-eight Corrupted Eterniums...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forty-seven... Forty-eight Corrupted Eterniums...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit whining. You're just packing Eternium. What's so hard that you have to gripe like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit whining. You're just packing Eternium. What's so hard that you have to gripe like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit whining. You're just packing Eternium. What's so hard that you have to gripe like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right, we went through hell all this time just to pack Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right, we went through hell all this time just to pack Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right, we went through hell all this time just to pack Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But is this not way too little for what's here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But is this not way too little for what's here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But is this not way too little for what's here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-the experiments were conducted at other labs too, so the amount for the Track Switcher should already be secured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-the experiments were conducted at other labs too, so the amount for the Track Switcher should already be secured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-the experiments were conducted at other labs too, so the amount for the Track Switcher should already be secured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More is always better. That's why we came here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More is always better. That's why we came here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More is always better. That's why we came here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Figures. We're basically cleaning up Felix's mess again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Figures. We're basically cleaning up Felix's mess again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Figures. We're basically cleaning up Felix's mess again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, do we have a way to move all of this without the townsfolk seeing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, do we have a way to move all of this without the townsfolk seeing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, do we have a way to move all of this without the townsfolk seeing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Relax. There are plenty of transport robots in here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Relax. There are plenty of transport robots in here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Relax. There are plenty of transport robots in here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's stockpile the Eternium in one place first, then head to the room with the Bronze Core.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's stockpile the Eternium in one place first, then head to the room with the Bronze Core.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's stockpile the Eternium in one place first, then head to the room with the Bronze Core.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. If we go this way, nothing will happen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. If we go this way, nothing will happen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. If we go this way, nothing will happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Natalia, what about your side?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Natalia, what about your side?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Natalia, what about your side?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox says this way is right too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox says this way is right too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox says this way is right too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This feels sloppy. At this point, do we even need you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This feels sloppy. At this point, do we even need you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This feels sloppy. At this point, do we even need you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-my foresight is unstable, I can't help that. Plus, cross-checking is safer than going solo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-my foresight is unstable, I can't help that. Plus, cross-checking is safer than going solo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-my foresight is unstable, I can't help that. Plus, cross-checking is safer than going solo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And finding the route is not the only job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And finding the route is not the only job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And finding the route is not the only job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Bronze Memory Core is a lot more dangerous than you think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Bronze Memory Core is a lot more dangerous than you think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Bronze Memory Core is a lot more dangerous than you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why? Is it different from a Shepherd's Heart?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why? Is it different from a Shepherd's Heart?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why? Is it different from a Shepherd's Heart?

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-similar but different. If the Shepherd's Heart is made from the tree's central organ...
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-similar but different. If the Shepherd's Heart is made from the tree's central organ...
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-similar but different. If the Shepherd's Heart is made from the tree's central organ...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Bronze Memory Core is... m-made from a piece of its root.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Bronze Memory Core is... m-made from a piece of its root.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Bronze Memory Core is... m-made from a piece of its root.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union's projects hinge on compatible subjects who show high resonance with certain factors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union's projects hinge on compatible subjects who show high resonance with certain factors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union's projects hinge on compatible subjects who show high resonance with certain factors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For Matryoshka, the goal is to build a combat-type Matryoshkas to implant the Bronze Core into.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For Matryoshka, the goal is to build a combat-type Matryoshkas to implant the Bronze Core into.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For Matryoshka, the goal is to build a combat-type Matryoshkas to implant the Bronze Core into.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why narrow it to Matryoshkas? Don't all the dolls already have a memory core?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why narrow it to Matryoshkas? Don't all the dolls already have a memory core?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why narrow it to Matryoshkas? Don't all the dolls already have a memory core?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If a memory core stores a person's memories, th-the Bronze Core is a device that evokes those memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If a memory core stores a person's memories, th-the Bronze Core is a device that evokes those memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If a memory core stores a person's memories, th-the Bronze Core is a device that evokes those memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Spriggan Factor directly affects emotions... so an ordinary person could get swallowed by overlaid memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Spriggan Factor directly affects emotions... so an ordinary person could get swallowed by overlaid memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Spriggan Factor directly affects emotions... so an ordinary person could get swallowed by overlaid memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Putting multiple memories into a doll's vessel is to hedge against that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Putting multiple memories into a doll's vessel is to hedge against that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Putting multiple memories into a doll's vessel is to hedge against that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After using the inferior memory cores to screen for candidates who can accept a Bronze Core...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After using the inferior memory cores to screen for candidates who can accept a Bronze Core...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After using the inferior memory cores to screen for candidates who can accept a Bronze Core...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Th-they hand the Bronze Core to the compatible subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Th-they hand the Bronze Core to the compatible subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Th-they hand the Bronze Core to the compatible subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I kind of get it now that you explained it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I kind of get it now that you explained it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I kind of get it now that you explained it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know your way around the Northern Union's business better than I expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know your way around the Northern Union's business better than I expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know your way around the Northern Union's business better than I expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
As far as I know, those projects
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
As far as I know, those projects
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
As far as I know, those projects
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hey, stop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hey, stop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hey, stop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm warning you, don't spell out what the Northern Union really is to Natalia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm warning you, don't spell out what the Northern Union really is to Natalia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm warning you, don't spell out what the Northern Union really is to Natalia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Drawing a line that the kid is off-limits?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Drawing a line that the kid is off-limits?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Drawing a line that the kid is off-limits?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm saying it for your sake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm saying it for your sake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm saying it for your sake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you sour Felix by messing with a kid she values, even a vampire won't live out her years.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you sour Felix by messing with a kid she values, even a vampire won't live out her years.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you sour Felix by messing with a kid she values, even a vampire won't live out her years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Values? The infamous Red Witch values that pipsqueak?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Values? The infamous Red Witch values that pipsqueak?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Values? The infamous Red Witch values that pipsqueak?

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be precise, she values the girl's ability.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be precise, she values the girl's ability.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be precise, she values the girl's ability.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Natalia is a prodigy whose theory work stands shoulder to shoulder with Northern Union researchers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Natalia is a prodigy whose theory work stands shoulder to shoulder with Northern Union researchers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Natalia is a prodigy whose theory work stands shoulder to shoulder with Northern Union researchers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she ever learns the truth and turns her back on the Northern Union...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she ever learns the truth and turns her back on the Northern Union...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she ever learns the truth and turns her back on the Northern Union...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think that woman will do to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think that woman will do to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think that woman will do to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Congrats. You just gave me one more reason to hate you people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Congrats. You just gave me one more reason to hate you people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Congrats. You just gave me one more reason to hate you people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I save you from a pathetic death and I don't even get a pass?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I save you from a pathetic death and I don't even get a pass?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I save you from a pathetic death and I don't even get a pass?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox, they're whispering without me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox, they're whispering without me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox, they're whispering without me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do they not like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do they not like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do they not like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox, where are you going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox, where are you going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox, where are you going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa. While I was talking to you, the kid bolted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa. While I was talking to you, the kid bolted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa. While I was talking to you, the kid bolted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why aren't you chasing her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why aren't you chasing her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why aren't you chasing her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In three seconds, on your seven.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In three seconds, on your seven.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In three seconds, on your seven.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I fired from a blind spot... and she blocked all of it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I fired from a blind spot... and she blocked all of it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I fired from a blind spot... and she blocked all of it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pft pft. The perfume I actually liked is now mixed with gunpowder stink.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pft pft. The perfume I actually liked is now mixed with gunpowder stink.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pft pft. The perfume I actually liked is now mixed with gunpowder stink.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, given my breath still smells like ginger, maybe it doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, given my breath still smells like ginger, maybe it doesn't matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, given my breath still smells like ginger, maybe it doesn't matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, you're fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, you're fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, you're fast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Small frame, but that punch hits hard. Were you some kind of gangster?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Small frame, but that punch hits hard. Were you some kind of gangster?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Small frame, but that punch hits hard. Were you some kind of gangster?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Special Armament shift. Reloading Kashtan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Special Armament shift. Reloading Kashtan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Special Armament shift. Reloading Kashtan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Target on...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Target on...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Target on...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Brawling the instant you lock eyes. Are Northern Union test subjects just muscle for brains?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Brawling the instant you lock eyes. Are Northern Union test subjects just muscle for brains?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Brawling the instant you lock eyes. Are Northern Union test subjects just muscle for brains?

records.m_Talk_ENG: One will take on the vampire. As for the other one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: One will take on the vampire. As for the other one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: One will take on the vampire. As for the other one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How heartless. After so long, you're not even going to say hello?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How heartless. After so long, you're not even going to say hello?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How heartless. After so long, you're not even going to say hello?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... you just swung to crush my head!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... you just swung to crush my head!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... you just swung to crush my head!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A hit like that would kill me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A hit like that would kill me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A hit like that would kill me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were going to dodge anyway. Quit whining.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were going to dodge anyway. Quit whining.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were going to dodge anyway. Quit whining.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, you have it coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, you have it coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, you have it coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember. I've fought her before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember. I've fought her before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember. I've fought her before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My foresight is shaky, but seeing a move or two ahead should be enough to win...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My foresight is shaky, but seeing a move or two ahead should be enough to win...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My foresight is shaky, but seeing a move or two ahead should be enough to win...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. How are you this fast?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. How are you this fast?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. How are you this fast?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really think this is my best right after thawing out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really think this is my best right after thawing out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really think this is my best right after thawing out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even a half-blood Bygone is still a Bygone. Getting beat up by a kid would look bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even a half-blood Bygone is still a Bygone. Getting beat up by a kid would look bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even a half-blood Bygone is still a Bygone. Getting beat up by a kid would look bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph. I'm impressed, but rebooting the off-limits zone's systems to draw you here went exactly as planned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph. I'm impressed, but rebooting the off-limits zone's systems to draw you here went exactly as planned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph. I'm impressed, but rebooting the off-limits zone's systems to draw you here went exactly as planned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One way or another you would clash with the militia, so I steered it so only the quick strike force would show up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One way or another you would clash with the militia, so I steered it so only the quick strike force would show up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One way or another you would clash with the militia, so I steered it so only the quick strike force would show up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Planning to pick us off in detail, are we?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Planning to pick us off in detail, are we?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Planning to pick us off in detail, are we?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nice strategy, but do you think you can fight me without your machine claws?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nice strategy, but do you think you can fight me without your machine claws?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nice strategy, but do you think you can fight me without your machine claws?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know. Trading blows bare-handed with a beast like you would be insane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know. Trading blows bare-handed with a beast like you would be insane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know. Trading blows bare-handed with a beast like you would be insane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why I said I reactivated the systems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why I said I reactivated the systems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why I said I reactivated the systems.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Counterfire warfare shooting control module
8g
8g ZEMINIA.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Counterfire warfare shooting control module
8g
8g ZEMINIA.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Counterfire warfare shooting control module
8g
8g ZEMINIA.

Annihilation Program online. Prioritizing targets
8g
8g
8g
8g
8g.

Annihilation Program online. Prioritizing targets
8g
8g
8g

records.m_Talk_FRA:
Annihilation Program online. Prioritizing targets

8g

8g
8g.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Annihilation Program? Is that a fancy way to say you are going to kill yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Annihilation Program? Is that a fancy way to say you are going to kill yourself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Annihilation Program? Is that a fancy way to say you are going to kill yourself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most of these weapons are set to prioritize enemies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most of these weapons are set to prioritize enemies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most of these weapons are set to prioritize enemies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're old, but because the databases were never updated I still read as part of the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're old, but because the databases were never updated I still read as part of the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're old, but because the databases were never updated I still read as part of the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While these two are a vampire from the Northern Union's experiments and a Matryoshka doll.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While these two are a vampire from the Northern Union's experiments and a Matryoshka doll.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While these two are a vampire from the Northern Union's experiments and a Matryoshka doll.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what about you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what about you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what about you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Kids these days try to solve everything with machines.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Kids these days try to solve everything with machines.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Kids these days try to solve everything with machines.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As your elder, I will knock some manners into you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As your elder, I will knock some manners into you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As your elder, I will knock some manners into you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Sitting in that awkward position has me feeling queasy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Sitting in that awkward position has me feeling queasy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Sitting in that awkward position has me feeling queasy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That big building there, is that the lab they were talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That big building there, is that the lab they were talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That big building there, is that the lab they were talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It collapsed once, but there was a lot worth salvaging, so I rebuilt it with my ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It collapsed once, but there was a lot worth salvaging, so I rebuilt it with my ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It collapsed once, but there was a lot worth salvaging, so I rebuilt it with my ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are lots of hazardous systems, so no one comes here unless they need to, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are lots of hazardous systems, so no one comes here unless they need to, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are lots of hazardous systems, so no one comes here unless they need to, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is exactly one person who visits this facility regularly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is exactly one person who visits this facility regularly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is exactly one person who visits this facility regularly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This business is probably her doing too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This business is probably her doing too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This business is probably her doing too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every town has at least one troublemaker.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every town has at least one troublemaker.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every town has at least one troublemaker.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You and the militia must have your hands full keeping her in line.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You and the militia must have your hands full keeping her in line.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You and the militia must have your hands full keeping her in line.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Strictly speaking, she isn't a villager. We are just letting her stay for a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Strictly speaking, she isn't a villager. We are just letting her stay for a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Strictly speaking, she isn't a villager. We are just letting her stay for a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is her name?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is her name?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is her name?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lenore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lenore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lenore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Figures. My bad hunches never seem to be wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Figures. My bad hunches never seem to be wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Figures. My bad hunches never seem to be wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Human tracks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Human tracks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Human tracks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just one. Looks like they have company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just one. Looks like they have company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just one. Looks like they have company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Three... And I can see traces of something non-human as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Three... And I can see traces of something non-human as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Three... And I can see traces of something non-human as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If several of them crossed into the off-limits zone, that cannot be for anything good. What do you want to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If several of them crossed into the off-limits zone, that cannot be for anything good. What do you want to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If several of them crossed into the off-limits zone, that cannot be for anything good. What do you want to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we just wait for the other militia members, we might be too late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we just wait for the other militia members, we might be too late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we just wait for the other militia members, we might be too late.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If they are moving quietly, that means they don't want to be noticed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If they are moving quietly, that means they don't want to be noticed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If they are moving quietly, that means they don't want to be noticed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're better off not giving them time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're better off not giving them time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're better off not giving them time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agreed. You are young and sharp. The more I see, the more I want to recruit you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agreed. You are young and sharp. The more I see, the more I want to recruit you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agreed. You are young and sharp. The more I see, the more I want to recruit you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, if my future apprentice is fighting, I cannot just stand by and watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, if my future apprentice is fighting, I cannot just stand by and watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, if my future apprentice is fighting, I cannot just stand by and watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I owe Lenore too, so I will lend you my strength.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I owe Lenore too, so I will lend you my strength.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I owe Lenore too, so I will lend you my strength.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Forty-seven... Forty-eight Corrupted Eterniums...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Forty-seven... Forty-eight Corrupted Eterniums...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Forty-seven... Forty-eight Corrupted Eterniums...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Quit whining. You're just packing Eternium. What's so hard that you have to gripe like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Quit whining. You're just packing Eternium. What's so hard that you have to gripe like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Quit whining. You're just packing Eternium. What's so hard that you have to gripe like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right, we went through hell all this time just to pack Eternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right, we went through hell all this time just to pack Eternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right, we went through hell all this time just to pack Eternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But is this not way too little for what's here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But is this not way too little for what's here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But is this not way too little for what's here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-the experiments were conducted at other labs too, so the amount for the Track Switcher should already be secured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-the experiments were conducted at other labs too, so the amount for the Track Switcher should already be secured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-the experiments were conducted at other labs too, so the amount for the Track Switcher should already be secured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More is always better. That's why we came here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More is always better. That's why we came here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More is always better. That's why we came here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Figures. We're basically cleaning up Felix's mess again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Figures. We're basically cleaning up Felix's mess again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Figures. We're basically cleaning up Felix's mess again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, do we have a way to move all of this without the townsfolk seeing?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, do we have a way to move all of this without the townsfolk seeing?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, do we have a way to move all of this without the townsfolk seeing?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Relax. There are plenty of transport robots in here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Relax. There are plenty of transport robots in here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Relax. There are plenty of transport robots in here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's stockpile the Eternium in one place first, then head to the room with the Bronze Core.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's stockpile the Eternium in one place first, then head to the room with the Bronze Core.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's stockpile the Eternium in one place first, then head to the room with the Bronze Core.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. If we go this way, nothing will happen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. If we go this way, nothing will happen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. If we go this way, nothing will happen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Natalia, what about your side?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Natalia, what about your side?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Natalia, what about your side?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox says this way is right too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox says this way is right too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox says this way is right too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This feels sloppy. At this point, do we even need you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This feels sloppy. At this point, do we even need you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This feels sloppy. At this point, do we even need you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-my foresight is unstable, I can't help that. Plus, cross-checking is safer than going solo.
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-my foresight is unstable, I can't help that. Plus, cross-checking is safer than going solo.
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-my foresight is unstable, I can't help that. Plus, cross-checking is safer than going solo.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And finding the route is not the only job.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And finding the route is not the only job.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And finding the route is not the only job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Bronze Memory Core is a lot more dangerous than you think.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Bronze Memory Core is a lot more dangerous than you think.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Bronze Memory Core is a lot more dangerous than you think.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why? Is it different from a Shepherd's Heart?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why? Is it different from a Shepherd's Heart?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why? Is it different from a Shepherd's Heart?

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-similar but different. If the Shepherd's Heart is made from the tree's central organ...
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-similar but different. If the Shepherd's Heart is made from the tree's central organ...
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-similar but different. If the Shepherd's Heart is made from the tree's central organ...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Bronze Memory Core is... m-made from a piece of its root.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Bronze Memory Core is... m-made from a piece of its root.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Bronze Memory Core is... m-made from a piece of its root.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Northern Union's projects hinge on compatible subjects who show high resonance with certain factors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Northern Union's projects hinge on compatible subjects who show high resonance with certain factors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Northern Union's projects hinge on compatible subjects who show high resonance with certain factors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For Matryoshka, the goal is to build a combat-type Matryoshkas to implant the Bronze Core into.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For Matryoshka, the goal is to build a combat-type Matryoshkas to implant the Bronze Core into.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For Matryoshka, the goal is to build a combat-type Matryoshkas to implant the Bronze Core into.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why narrow it to Matryoshkas? Don't all the dolls already have a memory core?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why narrow it to Matryoshkas? Don't all the dolls already have a memory core?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why narrow it to Matryoshkas? Don't all the dolls already have a memory core?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If a memory core stores a person's memories, th-the Bronze Core is a device that evokes those memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If a memory core stores a person's memories, th-the Bronze Core is a device that evokes those memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If a memory core stores a person's memories, th-the Bronze Core is a device that evokes those memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Spriggan Factor directly affects emotions... so an ordinary person could get swallowed by overlaid memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Spriggan Factor directly affects emotions... so an ordinary person could get swallowed by overlaid memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Spriggan Factor directly affects emotions... so an ordinary person could get swallowed by overlaid memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Putting multiple memories into a doll's vessel is to hedge against that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Putting multiple memories into a doll's vessel is to hedge against that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Putting multiple memories into a doll's vessel is to hedge against that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After using the inferior memory cores to screen for candidates who can accept a Bronze Core...
root.m_Talk_DEU: After using the inferior memory cores to screen for candidates who can accept a Bronze Core...
root.m_Talk_FRA: After using the inferior memory cores to screen for candidates who can accept a Bronze Core...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Th-they hand the Bronze Core to the compatible subject.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Th-they hand the Bronze Core to the compatible subject.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Th-they hand the Bronze Core to the compatible subject.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I kind of get it now that you explained it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I kind of get it now that you explained it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I kind of get it now that you explained it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know your way around the Northern Union's business better than I expected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know your way around the Northern Union's business better than I expected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know your way around the Northern Union's business better than I expected.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
As far as I know, those projects
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
As far as I know, those projects
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
As far as I know, those projects
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hey, stop.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hey, stop.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hey, stop.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm warning you, don't spell out what the Northern Union really is to Natalia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm warning you, don't spell out what the Northern Union really is to Natalia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm warning you, don't spell out what the Northern Union really is to Natalia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Drawing a line that the kid is off-limits?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Drawing a line that the kid is off-limits?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Drawing a line that the kid is off-limits?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm saying it for your sake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm saying it for your sake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm saying it for your sake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you sour Felix by messing with a kid she values, even a vampire won't live out her years.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you sour Felix by messing with a kid she values, even a vampire won't live out her years.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you sour Felix by messing with a kid she values, even a vampire won't live out her years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Values? The infamous Red Witch values that pipsqueak?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Values? The infamous Red Witch values that pipsqueak?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Values? The infamous Red Witch values that pipsqueak?

root.m_Talk_ENG: To be precise, she values the girl's ability.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To be precise, she values the girl's ability.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To be precise, she values the girl's ability.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Natalia is a prodigy whose theory work stands shoulder to shoulder with Northern Union researchers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Natalia is a prodigy whose theory work stands shoulder to shoulder with Northern Union researchers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Natalia is a prodigy whose theory work stands shoulder to shoulder with Northern Union researchers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she ever learns the truth and turns her back on the Northern Union...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she ever learns the truth and turns her back on the Northern Union...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she ever learns the truth and turns her back on the Northern Union...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think that woman will do to you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think that woman will do to you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think that woman will do to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Congrats. You just gave me one more reason to hate you people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Congrats. You just gave me one more reason to hate you people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Congrats. You just gave me one more reason to hate you people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I save you from a pathetic death and I don't even get a pass?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I save you from a pathetic death and I don't even get a pass?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I save you from a pathetic death and I don't even get a pass?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox, they're whispering without me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox, they're whispering without me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox, they're whispering without me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do they not like me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do they not like me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do they not like me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fluffox, where are you going?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fluffox, where are you going?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fluffox, where are you going?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa. While I was talking to you, the kid bolted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa. While I was talking to you, the kid bolted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa. While I was talking to you, the kid bolted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why aren't you chasing her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why aren't you chasing her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why aren't you chasing her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In three seconds, on your seven.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In three seconds, on your seven.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In three seconds, on your seven.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I fired from a blind spot... and she blocked all of it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I fired from a blind spot... and she blocked all of it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I fired from a blind spot... and she blocked all of it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pft pft. The perfume I actually liked is now mixed with gunpowder stink.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pft pft. The perfume I actually liked is now mixed with gunpowder stink.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pft pft. The perfume I actually liked is now mixed with gunpowder stink.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, given my breath still smells like ginger, maybe it doesn't matter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, given my breath still smells like ginger, maybe it doesn't matter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, given my breath still smells like ginger, maybe it doesn't matter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, you're fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, you're fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, you're fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Small frame, but that punch hits hard. Were you some kind of gangster?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Small frame, but that punch hits hard. Were you some kind of gangster?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Small frame, but that punch hits hard. Were you some kind of gangster?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Special Armament shift. Reloading Kashtan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Special Armament shift. Reloading Kashtan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Special Armament shift. Reloading Kashtan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Target on...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Target on...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Target on...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Brawling the instant you lock eyes. Are Northern Union test subjects just muscle for brains?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Brawling the instant you lock eyes. Are Northern Union test subjects just muscle for brains?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Brawling the instant you lock eyes. Are Northern Union test subjects just muscle for brains?

root.m_Talk_ENG: One will take on the vampire. As for the other one...
root.m_Talk_DEU: One will take on the vampire. As for the other one...
root.m_Talk_FRA: One will take on the vampire. As for the other one...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How heartless. After so long, you're not even going to say hello?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How heartless. After so long, you're not even going to say hello?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How heartless. After so long, you're not even going to say hello?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You... you just swung to crush my head!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You... you just swung to crush my head!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You... you just swung to crush my head!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A hit like that would kill me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A hit like that would kill me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A hit like that would kill me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were going to dodge anyway. Quit whining.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were going to dodge anyway. Quit whining.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were going to dodge anyway. Quit whining.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, you have it coming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, you have it coming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, you have it coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why you...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why you...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why you...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I remember. I've fought her before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I remember. I've fought her before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I remember. I've fought her before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My foresight is shaky, but seeing a move or two ahead should be enough to win...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My foresight is shaky, but seeing a move or two ahead should be enough to win...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My foresight is shaky, but seeing a move or two ahead should be enough to win...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. How are you this fast?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. How are you this fast?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. How are you this fast?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really think this is my best right after thawing out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really think this is my best right after thawing out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really think this is my best right after thawing out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even a half-blood Bygone is still a Bygone. Getting beat up by a kid would look bad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even a half-blood Bygone is still a Bygone. Getting beat up by a kid would look bad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even a half-blood Bygone is still a Bygone. Getting beat up by a kid would look bad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmph. I'm impressed, but rebooting the off-limits zone's systems to draw you here went exactly as planned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmph. I'm impressed, but rebooting the off-limits zone's systems to draw you here went exactly as planned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmph. I'm impressed, but rebooting the off-limits zone's systems to draw you here went exactly as planned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One way or another you would clash with the militia, so I steered it so only the quick strike force would show up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One way or another you would clash with the militia, so I steered it so only the quick strike force would show up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One way or another you would clash with the militia, so I steered it so only the quick strike force would show up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Planning to pick us off in detail, are we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Planning to pick us off in detail, are we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Planning to pick us off in detail, are we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nice strategy, but do you think you can fight me without your machine claws?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nice strategy, but do you think you can fight me without your machine claws?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nice strategy, but do you think you can fight me without your machine claws?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know. Trading blows bare-handed with a beast like you would be insane.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know. Trading blows bare-handed with a beast like you would be insane.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know. Trading blows bare-handed with a beast like you would be insane.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why I said I reactivated the systems.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why I said I reactivated the systems.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why I said I reactivated the systems.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Counterfire warfare shooting control module
8g
8g ZEMINIA.

Counterfire warfare shooting control module
8g
8g ZEMINIA.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Counterfire warfare shooting control module
8g
8g ZEMINIA.

Annihilation Program online. Prioritizing targets

Annihilation Program online. Prioritizing targets

root.m_Talk_ENG: Annihilation Program? Is that a fancy way to say you are going to kill yourself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Annihilation Program? Is that a fancy way to say you are going to kill yourself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Annihilation Program? Is that a fancy way to say you are going to kill yourself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Most of these weapons are set to prioritize enemies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Most of these weapons are set to prioritize enemies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Most of these weapons are set to prioritize enemies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're old, but because the databases were never updated I still read as part of the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're old, but because the databases were never updated I still read as part of the Northern Union.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're old, but because the databases were never updated I still read as part of the Northern Union.

root.m_Talk_ENG: While these two are a vampire from the Northern Union's experiments and a Matryoshka doll.
root.m_Talk_DEU: While these two are a vampire from the Northern Union's experiments and a Matryoshka doll.
root.m_Talk_FRA: While these two are a vampire from the Northern Union's experiments and a Matryoshka doll.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what about you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what about you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what about you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh. Kids these days try to solve everything with machines.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh. Kids these days try to solve everything with machines.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh. Kids these days try to solve everything with machines.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As your elder, I will knock some manners into you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As your elder, I will knock some manners into you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As your elder, I will knock some manners into you.
